_meta.description: Curated NCIt->upstream gold mappings for scoring issue #76 (xref precision/recall).
_meta.curated_by: seed (engine) — REQUIRES SME sign-off before treated as a hard oracle
notes: subject_id = bare NCIt code; object_id = CURIE matching candidate_ingest._iri_to_curie output.
predicate_id = full SKOS IRI, matching ontolib.repositories.xref.vocab values.
exactMatch = interchangeable senses (identity-grade); narrowMatch = object is NARROWER than the NCIt subject.
Anatomy IDs are standard Uberon organ classes; NCIt codes are from the SME-validated D23 organ table.
Composite NCIt staging organs (Colon,Rectum; Esophagus+GEJ) are deliberately NON-exact examples that exercise the scorer's predicate filter and must NOT count toward exactMatch precision.

Cell-origin (op:CellOrigin -> Cell Ontology) pairs are intentionally DEFERRED: NCIt normal-cell -> CL mappings need SME + Uberon/CL label verification before entering an oracle. See _pending_cell below.

_pending_cell.action: SME to supply a first batch of NCIt normal-cell -> CL pairs; do not fabricate CL IDs.

mappings.note: Colon,Rectum (composite staging organ) -> colon: object is narrower; NON-exact example
Esophagus and GEJ (composite) -> esophagus: object is narrower; NON-exact example
